creator: tesu@i.ua
text:
Created attachment 242121
Xorg log

Hello!

After upgrading xorg-server using pkg from 21.1.8_1,1 to 21.1.8_2,1 the server fails to start and I see this message when executing xinit:


[   202.185] (EE) modeset(G0): drmSetMaster failed: Invalid argument
[   202.185] (EE) 
Fatal server error:
[   202.185] (EE) AddScreen/ScreenInit failed for gpu driver 0 -1
